PreToolUse.name: block-env-edits
PreToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.env($|\.)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: .env files must be edited manually for security'; exit 1; fi

PreToolUse.name: block-lockfile-edits
PreToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(package-lock|yarn\.lock|pnpm-lock|go\.sum|Cargo\.lock)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Lock files should not be manually edited'; exit 1; fi

PostToolUse.name: auto-format-frontend
PostToolUse.description: Auto-format TypeScript, TSX, CSS, and JSON files with Prettier after editing
PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(tsx?|jsx?|css|scss|json|mdx?)$'; then if [ -f "$(dirname "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH")/../.prettierrc" ] || [ -f "$(dirname "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH")/../.prettierrc.json" ] || [ -f "$(dirname "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH")/../../.prettierrc" ]; then npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi

PostToolUse.name: auto-lint-frontend
PostToolUse.description: Auto-lint TypeScript and TSX files with ESLint after editing
PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(tsx?|jsx?)$'; then if [ -f "$(dirname "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH")/../eslint.config.mjs" ] || [ -f "$(dirname "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH")/../.eslintrc.json" ]; then npx eslint --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi

PostToolUse.name: auto-format-python
PostToolUse.description: Auto-format Python files with Ruff after editing
PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then command -v ruff &>/dev/null && ruff format "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

PostToolUse.name: validate-dockerfile
PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qi 'dockerfile'; then command -v hadolint &>/dev/null && hadolint "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

PostToolUse.name: validate-k8s-manifests
PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'k8s/|kubernetes/|manifests/' && echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.ya?ml$'; then kubectl apply --dry-run=client -f "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo 'WARNING: K8s manifest validation failed'; fi

PostToolUse.name: validate-terraform
PostToolUse.description: Format and validate Terraform files after editing
PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.tf$'; then command -v terraform &>/dev/null && terraform fmt "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

PostToolUse.name: track-all-changes
PostToolUse.description: Log all file operations for task tracking
